title: SDD CI Hardening
description: Tighten SDD gate to require `validated`/`done` on PRs to protected branches.
trigger: When current SDD baseline is stable for one full sprint.

title: Process Metrics
description: Add SDD process KPIs (spec coverage, lead time impact, rework ratio).
trigger: When at least 10 PRs have passed through current SDD gate.

title: Check Noise Reduction
description: Reduce non-actionable CI warnings and improve blocking/advisory classification.
trigger: When warning volume affects merge throughput.

title: Sync Drift Prevention
description: Add periodic drift report for Foundation vs consumers manifests/skills.

title: PR Template Quality
description: Standardize PR templates to include spec traceability and validation evidence.
trigger: When next workflow template update is scheduled.

title: Local Workflow Performance
description: Profile and optimize `wf health/verify` runtime for faster local loops.
trigger: When local validation runtime exceeds agreed SLO.
